plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine OpenAI ts Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Type the text 'Custom Engine Agent' into the dropdown search field within the 'New Project' modal of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm selection of the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu under the "New Project" dialog in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Click the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" window in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" selection dropdown at the top of the Visual Studio Code window.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the "Default folder" in the folder selection dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
